# Ipv4 vs ipv6 class (cidr list matching)

**Dataset**: `gx_10_conn` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IP / CIDR matching with incidr and the is_* address helpers. Ipv4 vs ipv6 class. the `is_*` address helpers return a boolean (false, not null, on non-match).

```sql
dataset = gx_10_conn | alter src_is_v4 = is_ipv4(src_ip), src_is_v6 = is_ipv6(src_ip) | filter src_is_v4 = true | fields src_ip, src_is_v4, src_is_v6
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 15). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
